items.name: Stardew Valley
items.description: You've inherited your grandfather's old farm plot in Stardew Valley.

items.name: HSH : Survive
items.description: ร่วมกันเอาชีวิตรอดและต่อสู้กับผีร้ายเพื่อกลับไปยังโลกแห่งความจริงอีกครั้ง

items.name: Timelie
items.description: เกมแนวพัซเซิลผจญภัย ที่ให้คุณพาสาวน้อยและเจ้าเหมียวตะลุยในห้วงแห่งเวลา

items.name: M.A.S.S. Builder
items.description: Customize and build your Mechanical Assault Skeleton Suit (M.A.S.S.).

items.name: Resident Evil 2
items.description: A deadly virus engulfs the residents of Raccoon City in September of 1998.

items.name: Resident Evil 3
items.description: Jill Valentine is one of the last remaining people in Raccoon City to witness the atrocities Umbrella performed.

items.name: Resident Evil 7 Biohazard
items.description: Fear and isolation seep through the walls of an abandoned southern farmhouse.

items.name: Resident Evil Village
items.description: พบกับความสยองขวัญในการเอาชีวิตรอดแบบที่คุณไม่เคยสัมผัสมาก่อนในเกมภาคที่ 8 ของแฟรนไชส์ Resident Evil

items.name: Devil May Cry 5
items.description: The ultimate Devil Hunter is back in style, in the game action fans have been waiting for.

items.name: STAR WARS Jedi: Fallen Order™
items.description: คุณจะได้สวมบทบาทเป็นพาดาวันผู้ถูกทอดทิ้งที่ต้องสำเร็จการฝึกฝนของเขาด้วยตนเองทั้งด้านทักษะการใช้พลังและด้านเพลงดาบเลเซอร์พร้อมกับหนีจากการไล่ล่าของกองทัพจักรวรรดิ

items.name: Assassin's Creed® Unity
items.description: Assassin's Creed® Unity tells the story of Arno, a young man who embarks upon an extraordinary journey to expose the true powers behind the French Revolution.

items.name: Outlast
items.description: Hell is an experiment you can't survive in Outlast.

items.name: Outlast 2
items.description: Outlast 2 introduces you to Sullivan Knoth and his followers.

items.name: State of Decay 2: Juggernaut Edition
items.description: The dead have risen and civilization has fallen. Now it's up to you to gather survivors.

items.name: The Awesome Adventures of Captain Spirit
items.description: Have you ever dreamt of being a superhero? Meet Chris, a creative and imaginative 9 year old boy who escapes reality with fantastical adventures as his alter ego.

items.name: Little Nightmares
items.description: Immerse yourself in Little Nightmares, a dark whimsical tale that will confront you with your childhood fears!

items.name: Oxygen Not Included
items.description: Oxygen Not Included is a space-colony simulation game. Deep inside an alien space rock your industrious crew will need to master science.

items.name: Don't Starve Together
items.description: Fight, Farm, Build and Explore Together in the standalone multiplayer expansion to the uncompromising wilderness survival game, Don't Starve.

items.name: Cities: Skylines
items.description: Cities: Skylines is a modern take on the classic city simulation.

items.name: Stellaris
items.description: Explore a galaxy full of wonders in this sci-fi grand strategy game from Paradox Development Studios.

items.name: Crusader Kings III
items.description: Paradox Development Studio brings you the sequel to one of the most popular strategy games ever made.

items.name: Dead Cells
items.description: Dead Cells is a rogue-lite, metroidvania inspired, action-platformer.

items.name: Planet Zoo
items.description: Build a world for wildlife in Planet Zoo. From the developers of Planet Coaster and Zoo Tycoon comes the ultimate zoo sim.

items.name: Mafia: Definitive Edition
items.description: An inadvertent brush with the mob thrusts cabdriver Tommy Angelo into the world of organized crime.

items.name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2018
items.description: Build and expand your repair service empire in this incredibly detailed and highly realistic simulation game.

items.name: The Walking Dead: The Final Season
items.description: A secluded school might finally be Clementine’s chance for a home, but protecting it will mean sacrifice.

items.name: The Park
items.description: Set in a creepy amusement park hiding a dark and sinister secret.

items.name: Phasmophobia
items.description: Phasmophobia is a 4 player online co-op psychological horror.

items.name: Desperados III
items.description: Desperados III is a story-driven, hardcore tactical stealth game, set in a ruthless Wild West scenario.

items.name: Shadow Tactics: Blades of the Shogun
items.description: ญี่ปุ่น ปี 1615, โชกุนใหม่ผู้หนึ่งได้ยึดอำนาจในการครอบครองญี่ปุ่นและรักษาความสงบเรียบร้อยของประเทศ

items.name: Hard West
items.description: When a tragic turn of events sets one man down a path of supernatural chaos and revenge, he must brutally hunt down all those who wronged him.

items.name: Into the Breach
items.description: Control powerful mechs from the future to defeat an alien threat.

items.name: Mortal Shell
items.description: Mortal Shell is a deep action-RPG that tests your sanity and resilience in a shattered world.

items.name: Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey
items.description: Survive your evolution in Neogene Africa starting 10 million years ago.

items.name: Raji: An Ancient Epic
items.description: A young girl named Raji has been chosen by the gods to stand against the demonic invasion of the human realm.

items.name: MudRunner
items.description: MudRunner is the ultimate off-road experience putting the players in the driver seat and dares them to take charge of incredible all-terrain vehicles.

items.name: Call of the Sea
items.description: Call of the Sea คือเรื่องเล่าเกี่ยวกับความลึกลับและความรักในโลกอื่นที่แปซิฟิกใต้ในช่วงปี 1930 สำรวจเกาะสวรรค์อันเขียวชอุ่ม ไขปริศนา และปลดล็อกความลับในการออกเดินทางค้นหาสามีของคุณที่หายตัวไป

items.name: Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice
items.description: จากผู้สร้าง Heavenly Sword, Enslaved: Odyssey to the West และ DmC: Devil May Cry เตรียมตัวพบกับการเดินทางของนักรบผู้ป่าเถื่อนสู่โลกแห่งเทพนิยายและความบ้าคลั่ง

items.name: The Medium
items.description: Discover a dark mystery only a medium can solve. Travel to an abandoned communist resort and use your unique psychic abilities to uncover its deeply disturbing secrets.

items.name: Valfaris
items.description: Set in a far corner of space, Valfaris is a heavy metal infused 2D action-platformer and the next game from the team behind Unity Awards finalist.

items.name: Loop Hero
items.description: The Lich has thrown the world into a timeless loop and plunged its inhabitants into never ending chaos.

items.name: Daymare: 1998
items.description: DAYMARE: 1998 is a third-person survival horror game that recreates the mood of iconic titles from the '90s, with a fresh storyline.

items.name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
items.description: Fight through Mordor and uncover the truth of the spirit that compels you.

items.name: Super Magbot
items.description: A precise 2D platformer with a twist. NO JUMPING. Master your magnetic powers to beat each level with speed and skill.

items.name: The Pathless
items.description: From the creators of ABZÛ, The Pathless is the mythic adventure of an archer and an eagle in a vast forest.

items.name: Demon Skin
items.description: Brutal Hack&Slash game with a challenging combat system plunges you into the harsh dark fantasy world to test your will and your skills.

items.name: ENDER LILIES: Quietus of the Knights
items.description: ENDER LILIES is a dark fantasy 2D action RPG about unraveling the mysteries of a destroyed kingdom.

items.name: LOST EMBER
items.description: Explore the remains of a fallen world from fascinating perspectives! Slip into the role of different animals to uncover the fate of an ancient world.

items.name: Omno
items.description: A single-player journey of discovery through an ancient world of wonders, created by solo developer Jonas Manke.

items.name: Draugen
items.description: Draugen is a single-player, first-person Fjord Noir mystery set in 1920s Norway. Explore a forgotten coastal village in your search for your missing sister.

items.name: Kena: Bridge of Spirits
items.description: A story-driven, action adventure combining exploration with fast-paced combat. As Kena, players find and grow a team of charming spirit companions called the Rot.

items.name: Jurassic World Evolution
items.description: Place yourself at the heart of the Jurassic franchise and build your own Jurassic World. Bioengineer dinosaurs that think.

items.name: Kitaria Fables
items.description: Action Adventure fused with RPG and Farming elements.

items.name: Frozenheim
items.description: Frozenheim is a serene Norse city builder with elaborate management gameplay and RTS tactical combat.

items.name: Valheim
items.description: A brutal exploration and survival game for 1-10 players, set in a procedurally-generated purgatory inspired by viking culture.

items.name: Idol Manager
items.description: A business sim about conquering the entertainment industry using any means you deem necessary.
